# MuleSoft Connectors

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (master) of Connectors documentation.
> See [Connectors llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/connectors/llms-full.txt) for all the Connectors documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Anypoint Connectors Release Notes](https://docs.mulesoft.com/connectors/introduction/connector-release-notes.md)
- [Anypoint Connectors Shared Responsibilities](https://docs.mulesoft.com/connectors/introduction/connectors-shared-responsibilities.md)
- [Configuring OAuth 2.0 for Connectors on CloudHub](https://docs.mulesoft.com/connectors/introduction/intro-config-oauth2-cloudhub.md)
- [Configuring OAuth 2.0 for Connectors](https://docs.mulesoft.com/connectors/introduction/intro-config-oauth2.md)
- [Using Anypoint Code Builder to Configure a Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/connectors/introduction/intro-config-use-acb.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure a Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/connectors/introduction/intro-config-use-studio.md)
- [Use XML to Configure a Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/connectors/introduction/intro-config-xml-maven.md)
- [Anypoint Connector Configuration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/connectors/introduction/intro-connector-configuration-overview.md)
- [Use Anypoint Exchange to Discover Connectors, Templates, and Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/connectors/introduction/intro-use-exchange.md)
- [Anypoint Connectors Overview](https://docs.mulesoft.com/connectors/introduction/introduction-to-anypoint-connectors.md)
- [Windows Gateway Services Configuration Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/connectors/windows-gateway-services/windows-gateway-services-guide-mule4.md)
